channel.title: Synthesis on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Synthesis on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Best Software Synths of 2026: From AI-Native to Analog Perfection
item.description: A look at the most powerful and innovative software synthesizers dominating the music production landscape in 2026.

item.title: Physical Modeling Synthesis: The Underrated Future of Sound Design
item.description: Why physical modeling - not sampling or wavetables - is the next frontier in expressive digital instruments

item.title: Music Production Blogs
item.description: Curated list of music production blogs covering DAWs, music theory, synthesis, and production techniques.
